headline: Dominion Energy Inc (NYSE:D) Breakout Setup Offers Perfect Technicals
summary: Dominion Energy (D) scores a perfect Technical Rating of 10 and Setup Rating of 9, signaling a textbook breakout pattern with strong consolidation before a potential move higher.
